expectations.text: model_created: Script creates a model with model create command
three_moving_parts: Three distinct rigid body parts are created (crank, coupler, rocker)
four_revolute_joints: Four revolute joints are created (crank-ground, crank-coupler, coupler-rocker, rocker-ground)
expectations.evidence: Four joints: rev_crank_ground, rev_crank_coupler, rev_coupler_rocker, rev_rocker_ground

expectations.text: motion_generator_on_crank: A motion generator drives the crank joint
constant_speed_360: Motion generator function specifies 360 degrees per second
expectations.evidence: function = "360D" with type_of_freedom = rotational and time_derivative = velocity; comment confirms 360 deg/s = 2*PI rad/s

expectations.text: simulate_transient: Script uses simulation single_run transient command
expectations.evidence: simulation single_run transient with end_time = 2.0, number_of_steps = 2000

expectations.text: full_keyword_names: All keywords spelled out fully — no abbreviated commands anywhere
expectations.evidence: All commands fully spelled out: model create, part create rigid_body name_and_position, part modify rigid_body mass_properties, constraint create joint revolute, constraint create motion_generator, simulation single_run transient, etc.

expectations.text: dot_path_names: All object names use full dot-path hierarchy (.model.part.marker)
expectations.evidence: All names use full paths e.g. .four_bar.crank.cm, .four_bar.ground.crank_pivot_mkr, .four_bar.rev_crank_ground

expectations.text: no_adams_id: No adams_id specified anywhere in the script
expectations.evidence: No occurrence of 'adams_id' found in the script

expectations.text: mass_properties_uses_modify: Mass/inertia set with part modify rigid_body mass_properties, not part create
expectations.evidence: part modify rigid_body mass_properties used for all three parts (crank, coupler, rocker)

expectations.text: creates_cm_and_passes_center_of_mass_marker: A .cm marker is explicitly created on each part BEFORE part modify mass_properties is called, and center_of_mass_marker is passed in every part modify rigid_body mass_properties call — if center_of_mass_marker is absent from ANY part modify call, this is FALSE
expectations.evidence: .four_bar.crank.cm, .four_bar.coupler.cm, .four_bar.rocker.cm each created before their respective part modify calls; center_of_mass_marker specified in all three mass_properties calls

expectations.text: geometry_present: At least one geometry shape is added to each moving part (crank, coupler, rocker)
expectations.evidence: geometry create shape link for crank (shape_body), coupler (shape_body), and rocker (shape_body)

expectations.text: adams_view_no_errors: CMD script runs in Adams View without any ERROR: lines in aview.log
expectations.evidence: No 'ERROR:' lines found in aview.log; log ends with 'batch run is finished' and 'Finished -----'
